# Pull Request

## 📋 Description

Provide a detailed description of your changes.

## 🔗 Related Issues

Fixes #(issue number)
Relates to #(issue number)

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI update
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility improvement
- [ ] 🧹 Code refactoring

## ✅ Checklist

Please check all that apply:

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have removed console.logs and debugging code

### Testing
- [ ] I have tested my changes in Chrome
- [ ] I have tested my changes in Firefox
- [ ] I have tested my changes in Safari (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested my changes in Edge (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested on mobile devices/responsive views
- [ ] I have tested keyboard navigation
- [ ] I have tested with a screen reader (if UI changes)

### Accessibility
- [ ] All interactive elements are keyboard accessible
- [ ] ARIA labels are present where needed
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG 2.1 AA standards
- [ ] Focus indicators are visible
- [ ] Changes respect `prefers-reduced-motion`
- [ ] Screen reader announcements are appropriate

### Performance
- [ ] Images are optimized
- [ ] No performance regressions
- [ ] Scripts are deferred where appropriate
- [ ] Animations use CSS or requestAnimationFrame
- [ ] No blocking JavaScript

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
- [ ] I have added/updated JSDoc comments
- [ ] I have updated related documentation

## 📸 Screenshots/Videos

If applicable, add screenshots or videos to demonstrate your changes.

### Before
<!-- Add screenshots of the current state -->

### After
<!-- Add screenshots of your changes -->

## 🧪 Testing Instructions

How should reviewers test your changes?

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

## 📊 Performance Impact

Describe any performance impact (positive or negative):

- Load time: [faster/slower/same]
- Bundle size: [larger/smaller/same]
- Lighthouse score: [before/after]

## ♿ Accessibility Impact

Describe accessibility impact:

- [ ] No impact on accessibility
- [ ] Improves accessibility
- [ ] Maintains current accessibility standards
- [ ] See accessibility section above for details

## 🎨 Design Notes

If this PR includes UI changes, provide design context:

- Design rationale
- Color choices
- Layout decisions
- Animation decisions

## 🚨 Breaking Changes

If this PR includes breaking changes, describe them:

- What breaks?
- Migration path
- Deprecation timeline

## 📝 Additional Notes

Add any additional notes, context, or considerations for reviewers.

## 🙏 Reviewer Notes

Anything specific you'd like reviewers to focus on?

**Built with consciousness ⚡ by [Your Name]**
